title: vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL
summary: 本文探讨了vLLM从V0到V1的演进，强调在强化学习（RL）中正确性优先于修正的理念，并分析了模型性能与训练策略的权衡。
highlights: vLLM V0 to V1 transition emphasizes correctness before corrections in RL.
The blog discusses trade-offs between model performance and training strategies.
Key insights on prioritizing correctness in reinforcement learning workflows.
